Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag

items.name_en: 【White Paris💯 3-Grid Embroidery Lady Dior】The Lady Dior embroidered bag features a fashionable and soft "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap for versatile carrying options. Detachable double-sided wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.

items.name_cn:
〖Grey Check Large Makeup Pouch〗
Dior latest Embroidery 🪡 Grey Check [Makeup Pouch] - instantly captivated, the round body is so adorable. The latest embroidery check design is both retro and fashionable, perfectly presenting a rich retro artistic atmosphere with exquisite craftsmanship. Stylish and chic overall~ The square cylindrical shape is casual and modern, perfect for posing or as a makeup bag, toiletry bag, and the capacity speaks for itself la~ Every girl needs one for travel and storage wah~
Model: 1298
Size: 25x15x14cm

items.name_cn:
#D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag 'Monogram with Leather'
This D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, offering a modern silhouette that enriches the D-Vibe line. Crafted with care from materials like blue Oblique print fabric, it highlights the Oblique print and is accented with smooth calfskin details. A practical style with a slip pocket for easy storage of daily essentials, featuring a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Zip closure
1 compartment
Internal slip pocket
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 2388
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
#Medium Signature Bucket Bag in Black
This Signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features tonal pebbled leather details and a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious compartment features a snap closure and leather strap opening, offering a secure place for daily essentials, with an interior pocket for added refinement. The medium size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing for easy carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Metal snap closure and leather strap opening; top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap; interior pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 24×21×14cm (L×H×W)
Fits 1 smartphone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
#New Arrival Christmas Edition
Medium Book Tote Handbag
Gold metallic thread embroidery of Dior Jardin d'Hiver pattern (36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm)
Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a mainstay piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Embroidered with the Dior Jardin d'Hiver pattern throughout and accented with gold metallic thread for a touch of elegance, this poetic design interprets Monsieur Dior's tapestry. It fits various daily items. The medium size features a CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder.
Front features CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo
Includes dust bag
Style: 8001

items.name_cn:
♣️DiorTravel Backpack 'Blue Cloth Large'
This DiorTravel Backpack cleverly blends Dior's classic details with a stylish and practical design. Crafted from blue tech jacquard fabric and fully patterned with Oblique, it features a prominent Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious main compartment has a zipper for easy access to daily items. It comes with a handle and shoulder straps, suitable for shoulder or backpack carrying.
Front features Christian Dior Paris logo
Adjustable straps
Front zippered pocket
Model: 096
Size: 35 x 41 x 15 cm (L x H x W)
Spacious enough to hold a 15-inch laptop, a clutch, a wallet, a phone, two card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

specs.rawTitle:
♣️DiorTravel Backpack "Small Blue Cloth"
This DiorTravel backpack cleverly blends Dior's classic details with a fashionable and practical design. Crafted from blue jacquard technical fabric, it is fully adorned with Oblique print and features a prominent Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious main compartment has a zipper for easy access to various daily essentials. It comes with a handle and shoulder straps, allowing it to be worn on the shoulder or as a backpack.
